item.g:title: Sizing Pack (Conventional Plastic)
item.g:description: Free samples in standard sizes with conventional plastic material. Perfect for testing different sizes for your products.

item.g:title: Assorted Eco Pouches Sample
item.g:description: Mixed eco-friendly sample pouches including PCR/Bio, Recyclable, and Compostable materials.

item.g:title: Custom digital printed top film of your design
item.g:description: Large format digital printed film sample. Perfect for testing print quality and colors.

item.g:title: Custom Digital Printed Hand Sealed Pouches
item.g:description: Custom size hand-sealed digital printed pouches. Test your exact specifications before bulk order.

item.g:title: 3 Side Seal Pouch – Clear, No Zipper
item.g:description: Crystal clear 3-side seal pouch with low barrier finish. Perfect for showcasing your products with full visibility.

item.g:title: 3 Side Seal Pouch – Clear, With Zipper
item.g:description: Resealable clear 3-side seal pouch. Combines product visibility with convenient resealing functionality.

item.g:title: 3 Side Seal Pouch – Metalised, No Zipper
item.g:description: Metalised 3-side seal pouch with high barrier protection. Ideal for light-sensitive and moisture-sensitive products.

item.g:title: 3 Side Seal Pouch – Metalised, With Zipper
item.g:description: Premium metalised 3-side seal with zipper. Maximum protection with convenient reseal for freshness retention.

item.g:title: Stand Up Pouch – Clear, No Zipper
item.g:description: Clear stand-up pouch with excellent shelf presence. Showcases your product while standing upright on shelves.

item.g:title: Stand Up Pouch – Clear, With Zipper
item.g:description: Resealable clear stand-up pouch. Perfect blend of visibility, shelf appeal, and resealable convenience.

item.g:title: Stand Up Pouch – Metalised, No Zipper
item.g:description: Metalised stand-up pouch with high barrier protection. Combines premium appearance with product protection.

item.g:title: Stand Up Pouch – Metalised, With Zipper
item.g:description: Premium metalised stand-up pouch with zipper. Our best-selling option combining all premium features.

item.g:title: Eco Digital – 3 Side Seal Pouch
item.g:description: Eco-friendly 3-side seal pouch. Choose from PCR/Bio Plastic, Mono Recyclable, or Biodegradable materials.

item.g:title: Eco Digital – Center Seal Pouch
item.g:description: Eco-friendly center seal. Simple and cost-effective design with sustainable material options.

item.g:title: Eco Digital – Stand Up Pouch / Doypack
item.g:description: Premium eco stand-up pouch. Excellent shelf presence with sustainable materials.

item.g:title: Eco Digital – Box Bottom Pouch
item.g:description: Eco box bottom pouch. Maximum stability and capacity with sustainable materials.

item.g:title: Eco Digital – Flat Squared Bottom Pouch
item.g:description: Eco flat bottom pouch. Premium flat bottom design with eco-friendly materials.

item.g:title: Eco Digital – Quad Seal Pouch
item.g:description: Eco quad seal pouch. Four-corner seal for maximum stability with sustainable materials.

item.g:title: Eco Digital – Side Gusset Pouch
item.g:description: Eco side gusset pouch. Classic coffee bag style with sustainable materials.

item.g:title: Compostable Flat Bottom Pouch – Natural Kraft
item.g:description: 100% compostable flat bottom pouch with natural kraft finish. Made from plant-based materials that break down in industrial composting facilities. Features one-sided zipper for resealability.

item.g:title: Compostable Flat Bottom Pouch – Milky Clear
item.g:description: 100% compostable flat bottom pouch with milky clear finish for product visibility. Made from plant-based materials with industrial composting certification. Features one-sided zipper for convenience.

item.g:title: Compostable Gusseted Bag with Adhesive Header
item.g:description: 100% certified compostable gusseted bag with adhesive header for secure sealing. Made from plant-based materials. Price includes air shipping. Multiple sizes available with optional hanging hole.

item.g:title: Custom Printed Compostable Gusseted Bag with Adhesive Header
item.g:description: Custom printed 100% certified compostable gusseted bag with adhesive header. Full-color digital printing available. MOQ 5,000 pcs per design. Volume discounts available up to 50,000 pcs.

item.g:title: Compostable Resealable Mailer Bag
item.g:description: 100% biodegradable resealable mailer bag made from PLA+PBAT. Features durable zip-lock closure for multiple uses, moisture and dust protection. Certified compostable - decomposes in 3 months (industrial) or 1-2 years (natural conditions).

item.g:title: Custom Printed Compostable Mailer Bag
item.g:description: Custom printed 100% biodegradable resealable mailer bag made from PLA+PBAT. Full-color printing with your brand logo and design. Features durable zip-lock closure for multiple uses, moisture and dust protection. Certified compostable.

item.g:title: Corn Fiber Tea Bags (Disposable PLA Filter Bags)
item.g:description: Food grade corn fiber (PLA) tea filter bags. Ideal for brewing tea, spices, and herbs. Lightweight, clean filtration, and strong permeability. Made from natural corn starch, safe and odorless. Fold-over type for easy filling and sealing. Price includes air shipping.

item.g:title: Custom Printed Corrugated Mailer Boxes
item.g:description: Premium custom printed corrugated mailer boxes ideal for coffee, tea, chocolate, and artisan food products. Features four-color CMYK printing with matte finish, optional gold foil and embossing. Made with FSC certified recycled paper—perfect for eco-conscious brands seeking sustainable premium packaging.

item.g:title: Custom Printed Tuck Boxes
item.g:description: Premium custom printed tuck boxes (cartons) with elegant matte finish, gold foil stamping, and embossed details. Perfect for chocolate bars, tea sachets, small confectionery, and artisan products requiring a sophisticated presentation. Made from FSC certified paper for eco-conscious brands.
